description_long: This bird features a robust, stocky body with a large head and a prominent, straight beak. Its plumage is predominantly dark slate-blue to blackish, with a striking white collar around the neck and a bold white stripe running from the base of the beak across the side of the head. The wings and back are speckled with fine white spots, while the underparts are paler. The legs are short and appear dark, with a hint of pinkish or brownish coloration. The tail is straight and appears relatively short and squared off, with subtle barring visible in some views.
description: A stocky, dark blue-black bird with a large head, white neck collar, and a straight, prominent beak. It has speckled wings, a squared tail, and short, dark legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's large head, straight beak, white neck collar, and speckled wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's broad back, speckled plumage, and squared tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the white head stripe, straight beak, and compact body.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the white collar, dark back, and symmetrical tail shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark blue-gray with white collar and head stripe, fine white speckling on wings and back
